# /llms.txt — OPTIONAL AI-context file (https://{{DOMAIN}}/llms.txt)
#
# HONEST STATUS (2026): No major AI engine (Google, OpenAI, Anthropic, Meta,
# Mistral) uses llms.txt as a ranking or citation input. Google confirmed
# (June 15, 2026) it "won't harm (nor help)" Search/AI-Overview visibility.
# Ship this ONLY as human/tooling-friendly context — expect ZERO ranking
# benefit. If it ever goes stale, DELETE it rather than let it drift.
# Keep NAP here IDENTICAL to the site, schema, and Google Business Profile.
# See docs/seo/ai-seo-geo.md §3 for authoring rules.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------

> AI appointment-setting & lead-response agency. We deploy and manage AI
> chat/SMS/web assistants that answer, qualify, and book inbound leads in
> seconds, 24/7 — with human support on call when it matters. Done-for-you
> setup and ongoing management for service businesses that already generate
> leads and lose them to slow follow-up.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://example.com/): speed-to-lead promise and how it works
- [Services](https://example.com/services/): AI receptionist, appointment setting, lead-response automation
- [Industries](https://example.com/industries/): med spas, dental/clinics, home services, real estate, coaches, agencies
- [Pricing](https://example.com/pricing/): plans and how to get started
- [About](https://example.com/about/): team, expertise, and the human-support model
- [Contact](https://example.com/contact/): book a call, {{PHONE}}, {{EMAIL}}
- [Blog](https://example.com/blog/): speed-to-lead and lead-response guides

## Key facts
- What we do: AI chat/SMS/web assistants for lead response + appointment setting
- Core promise: never miss a lead — AI that answers, qualifies, and books in seconds, 24/7, with humans on call
- Differentiators: speed-to-lead, done-for-you, human support, integrates with existing tools
- Serves: {{CITY}}, {{REGION}}, {{COUNTRY}}
- NAP: {{BRAND_NAME}}, {{ADDRESS}}, {{CITY}}, {{REGION}} {{POSTAL}}, {{COUNTRY}} · {{PHONE}} · {{EMAIL}}
